## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for SEO Specialist role at a content marketing services company.](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role is a new IC position across delivery org, focusing on high-level SEO strategy for multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Candidate has 7+ years of diverse SEO experience (agency, government, nonprofit) with strong technical skills](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Company structure uses "pods" for client work, with the SEO role supporting internal teams](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Position involves setting strategy, experimenting, and servicing internal pods as the "client"](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [New IC position sitting across delivery organization](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Focuses on high-level, objective SEO research and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Supports multiple client accounts managed by pod teams](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Opportunity to define processes and implement across client base](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Emphasis on adapting to AI search implementations](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Candidate Background

  - [7+ years in digital marketing and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Agency experience: 50+ clients, primarily B2B SaaS and healthcare](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Government work: Optimized consumerfinance.gov (100k+ pages)](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Current contract role: SEO/Analytics Manager for nonprofit](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Strong technical skills: on-page, off-page, technical SEO implementation](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Experience with enterprise-level sites and diverse client types](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### SEO Approach and Strategies

  - [Balances short-term wins (keyword rankings, traffic increases) with long-term goals (organic share of voice, rich results)](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Focuses on intent optimization and adapting to AI-driven personalized searches](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Uses monthly technical audits and defines top organic priorities](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Emphasizes education and buy-in from stakeholders for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Communicates SEO concepts to non-technical audiences using analogies (e.g., offensive vs. defensive SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

### Company Structure and Processes

  - [Services organization delivering growth marketing content](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Uses "pod" structure for client-facing teams](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Fully remote company with similar work streams across pods](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Aiming to unify processes more as the company grows](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [SEO role will support internal pods as the "client"](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Two more stages in the interview process](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Candidate to speak with Jason (another team member)](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Marilia (previous interviewer) to provide further details on next steps](https://fathom.video/share/XVUDKrzh1j8siks1Rzq6zszQH4JsCopL?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
